description: Prove that grafting a new branch onto a binary tree produces a tree whose count is the sum of the two counts.
preamble:
inductive BinTree (α : Type) where
  | leaf : BinTree α
  | branch : BinTree α → α → BinTree α → BinTree α

def BinTree.count : BinTree α → Nat
  | .leaf => 0
  | .branch l _ r => 1 + l.count + r.count

def BinTree.graftLeft (root newBranch : BinTree α) : BinTree α :=
  match root with
  | .leaf => newBranch
  | .branch l x r => .branch (l.graftLeft newBranch) x r
statement:
theorem BinTree.count_graftLeft_eq_sum_count (root newBranch : BinTree α) :
    (root.graftLeft newBranch).count = root.count + newBranch.count
